channel.title: SimpleStocks Member Feed Proof
channel.description: Proof of concept feed for SimpleStocks member posts.

item.title: POC Writer Test
item.description: This post was created from the hosted writer to prove the create-post loop works.

item.title: NVDA Gap Fill Note
item.description: NVDA defended the first zone. If buyers hold the retest, the next squeeze can start from here. If it loses the level, stand down.

item.title: Market Open Note
item.description: SPX is holding support. No chase until reclaim. Premium is still elevated, so wait for confirmation before pressing a new entry.

item.title: Earnings Risk Reminder
item.description: High premium is not free money. Earnings trades need defined risk, clear size, and no emotional averaging after the move starts.

item.title: Member Room Note
item.description: Clean entries beat busy screens. If the room is noisy, reduce the chart to the level, the invalidation, and the next decision.

item.title: SPX No Trade Zone
item.description: The best trade is waiting while price chops inside the box. Let the market leave the range before giving it your money.
